phoneticUs: 藞ko蕣n瑟藢f蓴藧rm; 藞k蓱藧n瑟藢f蓴藧rm
examples: The paper designed a fiber placement machine for coniform shaped objects.
Conventional method of slope stability analysis is more conservative for coniform slopes.
The calculating step, content and method of coniform tank and circular tank with a large length-height ratio are summarized.
